targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS raw_selected
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.raw_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) AS effective_open_selected
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND sr.status = 'affected'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  );

SELECT
  CASE sr.status
    WHEN 'affected' THEN 'open'
    WHEN 'not_affected' THEN 'suppressed'
    ELSE sr.status
  END AS status,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS external_open
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND sr.status = 'affected'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true'
  AND ('${exposure_scope}' = 'all' OR '${exposure_scope}' = 'external');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS internal_open
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND sr.status = 'affected'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true'
  AND ('${exposure_scope}' = 'all' OR '${exposure_scope}' = 'internal');

SELECT
  a.image_name AS "Image Name",
  SUBSTRING(a.image_digest, 1, 15) AS "Digest",
  ls.context->>'environment' AS "Environment",
  ls.context->>'is_exposed_public' AS "Is Exposed",
  ls.finished_at AS "Last Scanned"
FROM assets a
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT s.context, s.finished_at
  FROM scans s
  WHERE s.asset_id = a.id
    AND s.status = 'completed'
  ORDER BY s.finished_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) ls ON true
ORDER BY ls.finished_at DESC;

SELECT
  a.image_name AS image,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sr.status = 'affected') AS open,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sr.status = 'not_affected') AS suppressed
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  )
GROUP BY a.image_name
ORDER BY open DESC, suppressed DESC;

SELECT
  a.image_name AS "Image",
  sr.vuln_id AS "Vulnerability",
  sr.package_name AS "Package",
  sr.package_version AS "Version",
  sr.raw_severity AS "Raw Severity",
  sr.effective_severity AS "Effective Severity",
  CASE
    WHEN sr.status = 'affected' THEN 'open'
    WHEN sr.status = 'not_affected' THEN 'suppressed'
    ELSE sr.status
  END AS "Status",
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true' THEN 'External'
    ELSE 'Internal'
  END AS "Exposure",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(s.context->>'environment', ''), 'unknown') AS "Environment",
  sr.vex_justification AS "VEX Justification",
  sr.fix_version AS "Fix Version",
  sr.cvss_score AS "CVSS",
  s.finished_at AS "Scan Time"
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  )
ORDER BY s.finished_at DESC, sr.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT
  a.image_name AS "Affected Image",
  sr.vuln_id AS "Vulnerability",
  sr.package_name AS "Package",
  sr.package_version AS "Current Version",
  sr.fix_version AS "Available Fix",
  sr.effective_severity AS "Severity",
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true' THEN 'External'
    ELSE 'Internal'
  END AS "Exposure",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(s.context->>'environment', ''), 'unknown') AS "Environment",
  'open' AS "Status",
  sr.cvss_score AS "CVSS"
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON sr.scan_id = s.id
JOIN assets a ON s.asset_id = a.id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND sr.status = 'affected'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE sr.effective_severity
    WHEN 'Critical' THEN 1
    WHEN 'High' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Medium' THEN 3
    WHEN 'Low' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  sr.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST;

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    a.image_name AS "Image",
    sr.vuln_id AS "Vulnerability",
    sr.package_name AS "Package",
    sr.raw_severity AS "Original Severity",
    sr.effective_severity AS "Effective Severity",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true' THEN 'External'
      ELSE 'Internal'
    END AS "Exposure",
    COALESCE(NULLIF(s.context->>'environment', ''), 'unknown') AS "Environment",
    'suppressed' AS "Status",
    sr.vex_justification AS "VEX Justification",
    sr.cvss_score AS "CVSS",
    s.finished_at AS "Scan Time"
  FROM scan_results sr
  JOIN scans s ON sr.scan_id = s.id
  JOIN assets a ON s.asset_id = a.id
  WHERE s.status = 'completed'
    AND sr.status = 'not_affected'
    AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
    AND (
      '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
      OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
    )
    AND (
      '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
      OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
      OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
    )
)
SELECT *
FROM filtered
UNION ALL
SELECT
  CASE WHEN '${image_name}' = '__all' THEN 'All images' ELSE '${image_name}' END AS "Image",
  'No suppressed findings in selected scope' AS "Vulnerability",
  '' AS "Package",
  '' AS "Original Severity",
  '' AS "Effective Severity",
  CASE
    WHEN '${exposure_scope}' = 'external' THEN 'External'
    WHEN '${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' THEN 'Internal'
    ELSE 'All'
  END AS "Exposure",
  '' AS "Environment",
  'info' AS "Status",
  'No VEX suppressions matched current Image/Severity/Exposure filters.' AS "VEX Justification",
  NULL::double precision AS "CVSS",
  NULL::timestamp AS "Scan Time"
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered)
ORDER BY "Scan Time" DESC NULLS LAST;

0.text: No suppressed findings in selected scope

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS suppressed_count
FROM scan_results sr
JOIN scans s ON s.id = sr.scan_id
JOIN assets a ON a.id = s.asset_id
WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  AND sr.status = 'not_affected'
  AND ('${image_name}' = '__all' OR a.image_name = '${image_name}')
  AND (
    '${severity_scope}' = 'all'
    OR LOWER(sr.effective_severity) = LOWER('${severity_scope}')
  )
  AND (
    '${exposure_scope}' = 'all'
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'external' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') = 'true')
    OR ('${exposure_scope}' = 'internal' AND COALESCE(LOWER(s.context->>'is_exposed_public'), 'false') <> 'true')
  );

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT a.image_name FROM assets a JOIN scans s ON s.asset_id = a.id WHERE s.status = 'completed' ORDER BY 1;
list.description: Filter dashboard panels by selected image
list.label: Image
list.name: image_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT a.image_name FROM assets a JOIN scans s ON s.asset_id = a.id WHERE s.status = 'completed' ORDER BY 1;

list.description: Filter severity used by risk panels
list.label: Severity
list.name: severity_scope
list.query: All severities : all,Critical : critical,High : high,Medium : medium,Low : low,Unknown : unknown

list.label: Exposure
list.name: exposure_scope
list.query: All exposure : all,External only : external,Internal only : internal
